summary: Completed comprehensive UI/UX overhaul testing. All major features working correctly. Dashboard displays hero banner with gradient, 3 stat-cards with gradient borders, 5 category cards with glassmorphism. Sidebar navigation fully functional with all 5 category toggles, special links (Process Flow, Holiday Calendar), and Training links. Grievance portal form renders correctly. Wiki category pages show subcategory headers with glass-card page cards. Recent updates clickable. Logout works.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - 'tr cannot be a child of span' due to React DevTools wrapper injection. Not user-visible, cosmetic console warning.
Console warning: HTML hydration error - 'span cannot be a child of select' due to React DevTools wrapper injection. Not user-visible, cosmetic console warning.

passed_tests: Login: Email/password form submits successfully
Dashboard: Hero banner displays 'Welcome back, {name}' with gradient styling
Dashboard: 3 stat cards show (Categories: 5, Total Pages: 6, Role: Admin)
Dashboard: 5 category cards displayed in grid (Foundation, Operations, HR, Finance, Training & Learning)
Dashboard: Recent Updates section shows clickable page items
Dashboard: 'New Page' button visible for admin user
Sidebar: All 5 category toggles work (Foundation, Operations, HR, Finance, Training)
Sidebar: Foundation category expands showing Core Values, What We Do, Organigram
Sidebar: Operations category expands showing Process Flow
Sidebar: HR category expands showing Leave Policy, Holiday Calendar, Code of Conduct
Sidebar: Finance category expands showing Budget Approval, Expense Reimbursement
Sidebar: Training category expands showing Deep Learning, Training: Get Started
Sidebar: Process Flow link navigates to /process-flow
Sidebar: Holiday Calendar link navigates to /hr/holiday-calendar
Sidebar: Training: Get Started link navigates to /training/get-started
Sidebar: Deep Learning link navigates to /training/deep-learning
Sidebar: Submit Grievance link navigates to /grievances/submit
Sidebar: Manage Grievances link navigates to /grievances/manage (admin/HR only)
Wiki Category (/wiki/foundation): Shows 'Foundation' title with 3 pages in category
Wiki Category: Subcategory headers display with teal dot marker
Wiki Category: Page cards have glass-card styling with hover effects
Grievance Submit: Form renders with category select, description textarea
Grievance Submit: Anonymous toggle button present and functional
Grievance Submit: Submit button present (disabled until form filled)
Holiday Calendar: Stats cards show 17 Gazetted, 6 Restricted, 1 Observance
Holiday Calendar: Table renders 24 holiday rows
Dashboard category cards: Clicking Foundation card navigates to /wiki/foundation
Dashboard recent updates: Clicking page navigates to /wiki/page/{slug}
Logout: Button works, redirects to /login
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: Well-structured with glass-card and stat-card utility classes, proper data-testid attributes for testing
Sidebar.js: getSubLink() helper function handles special routing correctly for Process Flow, Holiday Calendar, Training links
index.css: New utility classes (glass-card, stat-card, sidebar-link, shimmer) properly implemented with gradient borders and hover animations
WikiCategory.js: Proper groupBySubcategory() function for organizing pages by subcategory
GrievanceSubmit.js: Form validation working, proper loading states
All data-testid attributes preserved from previous versions - testing infrastructure intact
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX overhaul complete. Key new CSS classes: glass-card (glassmorphism with hover lift), stat-card (gradient border pseudo-element), sidebar-link (animated left border on hover/active). Dashboard uses data-testid='dashboard-title', data-testid='category-card-{id}'. Sidebar toggles use data-testid='category-{id}-toggle'. Special links: process-flow-link, holiday-calendar-link, training-get-started-link, training-deep-learning-link. All features verified working.

dashboard.recent_updates: ✓ Clickable list of recent pages with timestamps
